title: thalictrum minus subsp. arenarium
intro: Thalictrum minus subsp. arenarium, also known as meadow rue, is a flowering plant species belonging to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of meadow rue include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe digestive issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Meadow rue can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
